IntroText: Whether guiding clients through a real estate transaction or restoring a classic home in one of Des Moines' historic neighborhoods, Eric brings a deep passion to the Des Moines community.
Bio:
Whether guiding clients through a real estate transaction or restoring a classic home in one of Des Moines' historic neighborhoods, Eric brings a deep passion to the Des Moines community.

Eric is a proud Des Moines native, University of Iowa graduate, and a huge backer of the metro area. He believes his hometown is the ultimate place to live, work, and raise a family. As the founder of Eric Quiner Realtor and the Des Moines Renovation Company, Eric loves all things real estate and renovation. He has a special passion for breathing new life into the community by bringing back the original charm of run-down, classic homes in historic Des Moines neighborhoods.

Eric’s professional journey is as vibrant as the properties he transforms. After years touring the country in a jam band and co-founding the Camp Euforia music festival outside Iowa City, in 2010 he launched his real estate career in Des Moines. Beyond his success as a top-producing Realtor and renovator, Eric's entrepreneurial spirit led him and his wife, Jenny, to establish Dogpatch Urban Gardens. They launched Dogpatch in 2015, developing it into a thriving community hub before selling the business in 2025.

Behind every real estate transaction and home restoration is Eric’s ultimate motivation—his family. He counts the life he’s built w

ery real estate transaction and home restoration is Eric’s ultimate motivation—his family. He counts the life he’s built w

ith his wife and their three boys his greatest success of all. Even with a packed schedule of family activities, restoring properties, serving his real estate clients, and playing keyboards in local bands, Eric stays completely grounded, bringing a genuine, down-to-earth approach to every project he tackles.

Behind every real estate transaction and home restoration is Eric’s ultimate motivation—his family. He counts his life with Jenny and their three boys his greatest success of all. Even with a packed schedule, Eric stays grounded, bringing a down-to-earth approach to every project he tackles.

IntroText: Since becoming a licensed REALTOR® in 2017, I have built the experience to confidently guide clients through any situation.
Bio:
Since becoming a licensed REALTOR® in 2017, I have built the experience to confidently my guide clients through any situation. I prioritize making clients feel heard, supported, and clear on their next steps. To me, real estate is about more than transactions—it’s about representing people with integrity while they move into a new chapter.

“Moving Mindfully” is the foundation of how I serve my clients, keeping them grounded in their goals, timing, and vision while creating a steady, thoughtful process.

Whether you're buying or selling, I'm committed to providing you with a smooth, low-stress and often enjoyable experience.

IntroText: Blending a sharp eye for design with deep client care, Jenna is a licensed Realtor dedicated to helping you discover a property’s true potential.
Bio:
Blending a sharp eye for design with deep client care, Jenna is a licensed Realtor dedicated to helping you discover a property’s true potential.

A licensed Iowa Realtor and proud Iowa State Uiversity graduate in merchandising and design, Jenna brings a unique, creative edge to the Des Moines metro market. She has a natural talent for spotting a property’s true potential.

Her transition to real estate was driven by over six years in the retail industry. There, she developed her passion for guiding clients through important, life-changing purchases with honesty, loyalty and care.

Today, Jenna is dedicated to making you feel completely comfortable and confident in your real estate decisions. Whether buying or selling, she is a trusted partner committed to your happiness every step of the way.
